settings.title: Your Laundry Schedule Is Controlled by the Weather
settings.description: You check the forecast before every wash. You rearrange your day around drying windows. And when rain hits mid-dry, you're rewashing a full load that now smells like damp towels. Your time is being stolen by something completely out of your control.
settings.quote: I'm so sick of planning my entire week around whether it's going to rain.

settings.title: The Dryer Costs a Fortune (And Ruins Your Clothes)
settings.description: At $2–$3 per load, your tumble dryer is quietly draining hundreds of dollars a year. And the clothes it doesn't shrink, it fades. You're paying premium prices for a machine that actively damages your wardrobe. That's not a solution — it's a tax on bad weather.
settings.quote: The dryer shrunk my favourite jumper and I'm still annoyed about it. But what choice do I have?

settings.title: Damp Clothes, Damp House, Damp Mood
settings.description: Clothes draped over every surface. A clothes horse blocking the hallway. That faint musty smell that never quite leaves. Indoor drying without a proper system doesn't just look bad — it's creating humidity that feeds mould, triggers allergies, and makes your home uncomfortable.
settings.quote: Our apartment looks like a refugee camp half the week with clothes hanging everywhere.

settings.title: Turbo-Fan Forced Airflow
settings.text_1: Unlike passive racks that rely on still air to slowly evaporate moisture, Nuracom uses up to 6 ultra-silent turbo fans to force a constant stream of air through your garments. This mimics nature's most effective drying method — a steady breeze — but indoors, on demand, regardless of what's happening outside.
settings.text_2: The result is dramatically faster drying without the heat damage of a tumble dryer. Your delicates stay intact. Your colours stay true. And your clothes are dry in hours, not days.
settings.highlight_text: Key difference: Forced airflow dries clothes up to 2x faster than passive air drying, while using a fraction of the energy of a tumble dryer.

settings.title: Ceiling-Mount Heat Capture
settings.text_1: Hot air rises. It's basic physics, and Nuracom uses it to your advantage. When your rack lifts to ceiling height with one touch, your clothes sit in the warmest zone of any room — where temperatures can be 3–5°C higher than floor level.
settings.text_2: Combined with the turbo-fan airflow, this creates an optimal drying environment that works with your home's natural convection currents. No extra heating needed. No energy wasted. Just smart engineering.
settings.highlight_text: Key difference: Ceiling mounting utilises wasted warm air that already exists in your home, eliminating the need for energy-hungry heating elements.

settings.title: UV Disinfection & Hygiene Control
settings.text_1: Drying clothes isn't just about removing moisture — it's about making them genuinely clean. Nuracom's UV disinfection system (Aero and Stratos models) eliminates bacteria and odour-causing microorganisms during the drying process. The Stratos goes even further with negative ion technology that actively removes dust mites.
settings.text_2: This means your clothes come off the rack not just dry, but hygienically clean. No musty smell. No hidden bacteria. Just fresh, ready-to-wear clothing, every single time.
settings.highlight_text: Key difference: UV disinfection and negative ion tech mean your clothes are cleaner coming off a Nuracom than out of most tumble dryers.

settings.title: Mark & Mount the Brackets
settings.description: Use the included template to mark your ceiling. Drill, plug, and secure the mounting brackets. Takes about 10 minutes.

settings.title: Attach the Main Unit
settings.description: Click the drying rack unit into the brackets. The obstruction-sensing system auto-calibrates as soon as it's powered on.

settings.title: Plug In & Connect
settings.description: Standard Australian power outlet. Download the Nuracom app, pair via Bluetooth, and you're ready to go. One-touch operation from day one.

settings.quote: I don't even think about the weather anymore when I do laundry. I just hang it up, press a button, and it's dry by the time I get home from work. Should have bought this years ago.
settings.name: Jessica M.

settings.quote: We live in a two-bedroom apartment with zero outdoor space. The Nuracom goes up to the ceiling and completely disappears. Our electricity bill dropped noticeably the first month. Best home purchase we've made.
settings.name: Daniel T.

settings.quote: I bought the Stratos and the UV feature is incredible. Our baby's clothes come off genuinely clean and fresh. The app is easy and the remote is handy. Installation took me about 25 minutes.
settings.name: Sarah A.

settings.title: Protected While You Save
settings.text: 5 years on the motor. 2 years on every part. 1 year of full unit servicing included. Your investment is covered well past the point it's already paid for itself.

settings.title: Local Support, Real People
settings.text: Australian-designed for Australian homes. Local customer support that actually picks up. You're not dealing with a faceless import brand — we're here when you need us.

settings.title: No Hidden Costs
settings.text: Direct supply means no middleman markups. Free delivery to metro areas. And with $354+ in annual energy savings, the maths keeps getting better every year you own it.

settings.question: How fast does it actually dry clothes?
settings.answer: Drying time depends on the fabric, load size, and ambient conditions, but most users report their clothes are dry within 3–6 hours — compared to 24–48 hours on a passive rack. The Stratos model with 6 turbo fans cuts this further to approximately 2–4 hours for typical loads. This is genuinely transformative compared to traditional indoor drying.

settings.question: Will it work with my ceiling type?
settings.answer: Nuracom systems are compatible with standard plasterboard, timber, and concrete ceilings — which covers the vast majority of Australian homes. The mounting brackets are included with every purchase, and our installation guide covers all common ceiling types. If you're unsure, our support team can advise before you buy.

settings.question: How much weight can it hold?
settings.answer: The Breeze holds up to 30kg, the Aero up to 35kg, and the Stratos up to 40kg of wet laundry. To put that in context, a full washing machine load of wet clothes typically weighs 8–12kg. So even the Breeze can handle 2–3 full loads at once. The obstruction sensing system also prevents overloading.

settings.question: Is it noisy?
settings.answer: No. Nuracom uses ultra-silent motors specifically engineered to operate below conversational volume. You can run it while watching TV, sleeping, or working from home without noticing it. This was a non-negotiable design requirement for us — a noisy drying system defeats the purpose of home convenience.

settings.question: Do I really not need a tradesperson to install it?
settings.answer: Correct. The system plugs into a standard Australian power outlet — no electrician required. The ceiling mount uses standard bracket fixings (included). If you've ever put up a curtain rod or a shelf, you have the skills needed. Most customers complete installation in 20–30 minutes. We also include a detailed video walkthrough with every purchase.

settings.question: What if I'm not happy with it?
settings.answer: We want you to be completely satisfied. Nuracom offers comprehensive warranty coverage (up to 5 years on the motor) and responsive Australian customer support. If you have any issues, our team is available to help troubleshoot or arrange service. We stand behind our products because we know they work.
